bids.reasoning: At t=0.0 there is no time pressure to concede, so I am targeting my maximum-utility bid. The opponent opened with all valueD, which is the lowest utility for me on every issue and gives no evidence yet of willingness to make balanced concessions.

I am targeting a very high-utility bid because it is still extremely early (t=0.02), and the opponent has not conceded at all, repeating the all-valueD offer that is worst for me. To avoid simply repeating my previous exact bid while still protecting my high-weight issues, I concede only on the lowest-weight issueD.

I am targeting a very high utility offer because it is still very early (t=0.04), while making a small concession on the lowest-weight issueD to avoid repeating my last bid. The opponent has only slightly conceded so far, moving issueA from valueD to valueC while keeping the other issues at valueD, so I should not make major concessions yet.

At t=0.06 it is still very early, so I am targeting a high-utility bid while making a small concession on my lowest-weight issue. The opponent has moved from all valueD to conceding issueA and issueB up to valueC, but they are still holding issueC and issueD at valueD, so I will concede issueD first while preserving my more important issues.

I am targeting a high utility bid around 0.866 because it is still very early, so there is no need to concede heavily yet. The opponent has mostly offered low-utility bids for me, with only small concessions on issueA/issueB/issueC, so I will hold firm on my highest-weight issues A and B while conceding more on lower-weight issueD and slightly on issueC.

At t=0.10 it is still early, so I am targeting a high-utility bid while making limited concessions on lower-weight issues. The opponent has improved somewhat from all valueD offers but is still mostly offering low-utility outcomes for me, so I will hold firm on the most important issues A and B while varying my prior bid to avoid exact repetition.

I targeted a high-utility bid around 0.866, since it is still very early at t=0.12 and the opponent’s offers remain low for me despite some movement. Their recent bids suggest they may value issueD and issueC, so I concede on the low-weight issueD and partially on issueC while holding firm on my high-weight issueA and issueB.

I am targeting a high-utility bid around 0.81 because it is still early at t=0.14 and the opponent’s offers remain low-value to me despite some movement. Their bids suggest they may prefer lower-ranked values, so I continue conceding on lower/moderate priority issues while holding firm on my most important issues A and B.

I am targeting a high-utility bid around 0.87 because it is still early at t=0.16, so there is no need to make major concessions yet. The opponent has improved their offers somewhat, especially on issueA and issueC, but they are still far from my preferred outcomes on issueB, so I will hold firm on the two highest-weight issues while conceding on lower-weight issues.

I am targeting a high-utility bid around 0.893 because it is still early at t=0.18, so I should not concede too much yet. The opponent has improved substantially for me, especially moving issueA to valueA and issueC to valueB, but they are still holding issueB at valueD, so I will hold firm on the high-weight issues A and B while making a modest concession on lower-weight issueC and issueD.

At t=0.20 it is still early, so I am targeting a high-utility bid around 0.81 while making concessions mainly on lower-weight issues. The opponent has mostly pushed low values for issueB/C/D and only once conceded issueA to valueA, so I will hold firm on my most important issues A and B while offering valueC/valueD on less important issues to improve acceptability without over-conceding.

I am targeting a high utility bid around 0.87 because it is still early at t=0.22, so there is no need to make large concessions yet. The opponent’s offers have improved for me, especially on issueA and issueB, but they still keep issueD low and have sometimes moved on issueC, so I will hold firm on my highest-weight issues while conceding issueD and partially conceding issueC.

I am targeting a high utility around 0.81 because it is still early-mid negotiation at t=0.24, so there is no need to concede heavily yet. The opponent’s offers have fluctuated and their latest offer is quite poor for me, though they have previously offered issueA:valueA and some movement on issueC, so I will hold firm on high-weight issueA and issueB while conceding on lower-weight issueC and issueD.

At t=0.26 I am still targeting a high-utility bid around 0.87, since there is substantial time left and the opponent’s concessions are noisy rather than consistently improving. The opponent has sometimes offered issueA=valueA and issueC=valueB, so I hold firm on the high-weight issues A and B while conceding mainly on lower-weight issueD.

I am targeting a strong but slightly more conciliatory bid around 0.84 utility, since we are still before the midpoint but the opponent has shown some movement from all-valueD toward mixed offers. Their best signals to me include concessions on issueA at times, but they continue to push issueB/issueC/issueD downward, so I will hold firm on the high-weight issues A and B while conceding more on lower-weight C and D. This also avoids repeating my immediately previous bid.

At t=0.30 I am still targeting a fairly strong utility while making a clearer concession than my last bid, especially on lower-weight issues and one mid-weight issue. The opponent has repeatedly pushed issueB/issueD away from my preferred values and their latest offer is still low for me, so I hold firm on my most important issueA while offering concessions on issueB, issueC, and issueD.

I targeted a moderate utility around 0.68, since we are still before the midpoint but the opponent has shown some willingness to move on issueA and issueB while continuing to push low values on issueC/issueD. I am holding firm on issueA, my most important issue, while conceding more on lower-weight issueC and issueD to explore a tradeoff without dropping too far this early.
